Are you ready to join the team at Tarbiyah Learning Academy?  We are accepting applications now for the 2026-2027 school year.

If you have your B. Ed and are passionate and dedicated, we need you to apply!

Email careers@tarbiyahlearning.ca today to apply to work with us. 

We hope to be working with you soon!
